summary: Indexes the accepted ship artifacts for the inbox convention migration re-entry slice. The delivery report states that standalone inbox migration writes now require an approved manifest, nested legacy thread discovery is covered, review passes, and no blockers remain.
interfaceNotes: Standalone inbox migration writes require --manifest <path> and TESSERACT_MIGRATION_GO=1.
Combined work-plus-inbox migrations continue to use migrate-timestamp-naming.mjs --write --manifest with the combined timestamp manifest.
Legacy thread discovery recurses nested legacy feature directories while skipping already-migrated day and task subtrees.

notIndexed.reason: No matching outbox delivery-report file was found during the index stage.
